case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PHILADELPHIA REINSURANCE CORP.

docket_entries.description: PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT PHILADELPHIA REINSURANCE CORP. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
